bugs.error_message: rm: cannot remove data/boardbank.db: Device or resource busy
bugs.root_cause: TaskStop on Windows kills the npm wrapper but the child node process survives, keeping the SQLite file handle open and port 3000 occupied
bugs.fix: Find PID via netstat -ano | grep :3000, kill with taskkill //F //PID <pid>, then delete DB files

bugs.error_message: npm run build tren VPS 512MB bi OOM kill (tsc + vite/rollup can 400-800MB RAM)
bugs.root_cause: Runbook muc 2 huong dan chay npm run build tren server — trai voi thiet ke master plan (VPS khong bao gio build). tsx nam trong devDependencies nen npm ci --omit=dev lam server khong chay duoc, buoc phai cai full deps + build.
bugs.fix: Chuyen tsx sang dependencies; tao scripts/deploy.sh (build o may dev, upload web/dist qua ssh tar, server chi git pull + npm ci --omit=dev); viet lai DEPLOY.md muc 2 kem canh bao va muc cap cuu (swap file 1GB, don node_modules).
